cells.rationale: Investigation-first debugging of a subtle correctness invariant on a non-human-recoverable distress-clear path where a wrong or over-aggressive fix mass-clears legitimate live rows — a nameable correctness gate for opus at the hard-debugging band.

Well-specified multi-file consolidation of ~8 spawn sites into one shared helper with a named acceptance (absolute path, existence probe, log-once latch, truth-table extension) — GPT workhorse territory, no opus-grade judgment needed.

Substantial but well-specified hygiene work — six mechanical constant migrations plus a source-wide lint modeled on an existing walker idiom with fixtures and a shrink-only allowlist, all with concrete acceptance.
Small single-verb output change adding resolved project root/name to JSON and human output with a clear temp-project test plan and preserved error path — ordinary well-specified bounded work.
